benefits.description: Lost 50 lbs over approximately 7 months while stacking tirz and sema; dropped approximately 10% body fat per scan comparison; started health journey at 270 lbs in November 2022, lost 50 lbs by June 2023 through diet alone, then started peptides to break a stall and lost an additional 50 lbs (220 to 170 lbs)
Quiets the brain, super helpful for binge eating disorder
Physical activity enabled by weight loss has been great for mental health
Much easier to move body now

protocol_notes: Started health journey at 270 lbs in November 2022; lost 50 lbs through diet change alone by June 2023; started stacking tirz (Mondays) and sema (Thursdays) in June 2023 to break a stall; following high protein/low carb diet and moderate exercise; body composition tracked via Me360 app body scan; starting weight for peptide phase was 220 lbs, current weight 170 lbs, goal weight 145 lbs.
